source.section: Part 11 - Defence: RWR & Countermeasures > AN/ALE-47 ACMDS (Airborne Countermeasures Dispenser System)

steps.action: In the TAC menu, select the EW (Early Warning) page
Once aircraft is in the air, ALE-47 status will perform a series of built-in tests by going to SF TEST (Self-Test), then PBIT GO, then to STBY.
Once ALE-47 status is set to STBY, click on the OSB above ALE-47 to select the countermeasure dispenser. ALE-47 will be boxed in green.
Click the OSB next to MODE to select desired dispenser mode (MAN1 (Manual), S/A (Semi-Automatic), AUTO, STBY). We will choose MAN1.

To create a countermeasure program: Press the OSB next to ARM Configure Chaff by pressing the OSB next to CHAF, then use the Increment/Decrement OSBs to set the desired number Configure Flares by pressing the OSB next to FLAR, then use the Increment/Decrement OSBs to set the desired number Configure the number of repetitions by pressing the OSB next to RPT, then use the Increment/Decrement OSBs to set the desired number Configure the interval time (sec) by pressing the OSB next to INT, then use the Increment/Decrement OSBs to set the desired number Press the OSB next to SAVE to save countermeasure program 1 Increment/Decrement OSBs You can set different programs by clicking STEP to cycle through different programs COUNTERMEASURES - CHAFF & FLARES AN/ALE-47 ACMDS (AIRBORNE COUNTERMEASURES DISPENSER SYSTEM) COUNTERMEASURE PROGRAM &

To dispense countermeasures using Program 1, press the Dispense Switch – AFT button (key binding: D). (Note: the Dispense Switch – FWD button will use Program 5 by default. You can) modify which program is used by either AFT or FWD Dispense by clicking on the STEP OSB. Dispense Switch AFT – OFF - FWD Countermeasure Modes MAN: manual program that can be stored and edited. You choose what the program is. AUTO: the ALE-47 chooses for you when to deploy countermeasures and what to use. Very wasteful mode, but reduces pilot workload. S/A: Semi-Automatic. ALE-47 will choose the best countermeasure program for you in response to the current threats, but you will have control on when the countermeasures are dispensed.
